original_image_tags: Scan of the back of a white photographic print. The paper shows aging with slight discoloration and spotting. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the bottom edge. The front of the photograph is not visible.

elements.description: A faint, stamped text block in the center reads 'OFFICIAL PHOTOGRAPH U.S. ARMY AIR FORCE 401 BASE UNIT PHOTO LABORATORY HAMILTON FIELD, CALIFORNIA FILE'. There is a handwritten number at the top: '62-83894-162'. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the hole-punch marks, but B adds specific quoted text (stamp and handwritten number) not present in A, without contradiction.
